Bank of America Q2 Loans And Deposits Grow, Efficiency Ratio Increases To 64.58% Bank of America Corp (NYSE:BAC) reported second-quarter fiscal 2025 net income of $7.1 billion (versus $6.9 billion a year ago) and EPS of $0.89, beating the analyst consensus estimate of $0.87. Revenue, net of interest expense, increased 4% year-over-year (Y/Y) to $26.5 billion, missing the analyst consensus estimate of $26.8 billion.
